caption: A news broadcast features a series of graphics discussing political developments in India. The screens show a man with a beard wearing a white collared shirt, positioned next to data regarding the "2019 लोक सभा कुल सीटें 42" and a Congress party logo with the number "02". Text overlays in Hindi appear throughout, including a headline that reads "नीतीश कुमार ने 9वीं बार CM पद की शपथ ली". Other text elements mention "डिप्टी CM" and "मंत्री," listing names such as "सुब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "विजेंद्र यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार." As the sequence progresses, the top banner changes from "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" to "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". Additionally, a portrait of Nitish Kumar appears on the left side of the screen with the label "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". The timestamp "10:08 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner across all frames.
